description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rakudo-star:2018.01 Docker image and runs a before_script that executes 'zef update' then 'zef --depsonly install .' to install Perl 6 dependencies. Add a test stage job named test that only runs on the master branch and runs the command prove -ve 'perl6 -Ilib'. No caches, artifacts, services, or additional variables are defined.
